productName: (2x0.5g) Diamond Dinger - Bottom of the Ninth Blaze (S)
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Bottom of the Ninth Blaze supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
